observation.messy_prompt:
Customer email: Need 10,000 units by day 12. Same ABS as last time. Can you do $0.20/unit?
Operator note: M4 sounded rough this afternoon; might need maintenance.
Inventory: ABS=220kg, Nylon=80kg, PP=40kg.
Machine log: M1 uptime=95%, M2 uptime=90%, M3 uptime=92%, M4 uptime=88%.
HR: operator O2 out sick one day this period.
Current jobs: J110 due day 3 high priority; J111 due day 4 low priority; J101 due day 5 high priority.

job_source.summary: Imported 200 RAFS order lines across 108 orders (SKU references and quantities drawn from real RAFS orders), mapped to plan-3 (cold-chain / quarantine / maintenance): 111 source zones, 6 stations, 3 route constraints, 3 job families, layout pressure 0.498.
